reason: Changing the system-wide cryptographic policy to FIPS:STIG modifies the crypto stack for all services. This can break non‑FIPS‑compatible binaries, cause SSH cipher mismatches, and potentially lock out remote access. The policy explicitly flags FIPS‑related changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: authentication/authorization affected; Potential loss of SSH access due to unsupported ciphers; Breakage of services that rely on non‑FIPS algorithms; System instability if FIPS mode is not fully supported
